name: Varmilo VBS108 wireless Bluetooth 5.0/2.4Ghz/type-c wired 108 keys three Modes Connectable Mechanical Gaming Keyboard, PBT keycaps, Cherry MX Red switches
shortName: Varmilo VBS108 wireless Bluetooth 5.0/2.4Ghz/type-c wired 108 keys
description: Varmilo VBS108 is a 108-key wireless mechanical gaming keyboard with triple connectivity (Bluetooth, 2.4GHz, USB-C) and Cherry MX Red switches, designed for gamers seeking versatile input options.
